texts.t002: Pedestrian entrance control — tripod, flap and full-height turnstiles with RFID, fingerprint and face-recognition integration for offices, factories and stadiums.
texts.t012: SIE-M1000/M2000 manual-assist and A2000 fully-automatic tripods for lobbies and factories.
texts.t013: SIE-FB800 fast flap gates for premium office lobbies and metro-style throughput.
texts.t014: SIE-FH5000 rotor turnstiles for unmanned perimeters and stadiums.
texts.t015: RFID, biometric and face-recognition readers with attendance and visitor software.
texts.t016: Can turnstiles integrate with our attendance system?
texts.t017: Yes — Wiegand/RS-485/TCP-IP outputs integrate with most attendance and visitor-management software.
texts.t025: GI, aluminium, polycarbonate & India's only 100% Indian-make full-length transparent shutter.
texts.t026: Rapid roll PVC doors up to 100 RPM-class SIE40–SIE100 motors for hygiene, logistics and cold chain.
texts.t027: Insulated overhead sectional doors, stacking doors and residential garage automation with SIE16/36 openers.
texts.t028: Get a same-day recommendation for turnstiles & access control
texts.t029: Share your opening size and a photo — our Mumbai engineering desk replies with the right system and budget.
